metadata.description: The subject is a male-presenting individual in their 30s to 40s with olive skin and visible fine lines around the eyes. Their face is an oval shape with a defined jawline. Dark brown, wavy hair is pulled back into a bun, revealing a slightly receding hairline at the temples. The eyes are almond-shaped and dark brown, set slightly wide apart. Thick, dark eyebrows have a natural, slightly arched shape. The nose is prominent with a straight bridge and a rounded tip. Lips are medium thickness with a well-defined cupid's bow. A full, dark beard and mustache are present, with some lighter grey hairs visible, and a small mole is visible on the left cheekbone. The subject has a direct gaze with a neutral expression, and the head is angled slightly to the right.
metadata.anchor: Male-presenting with dark hair in a bun and a full beard.
